---
title: "10 Filter INDELs"
author: "subhash"
date: "2025-10-15"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

# Purpose

Select INDEL and mixed records from the raw VCF and apply hard filters.

# Inputs

- Raw VCF:
  `/work/jyanglab/subhash/6.genomicsdb_5mb/genotype_vcfs/RAW_vcf/RAW_SAP_BQSR.vcf.gz`

# Outputs

- Final filtered INDEL VCF:
  `/work/jyanglab/subhash/6.genomicsdb_5mb/genotype_vcfs/final_vcf/results/SAP_BQSR_filtered_indels.vcf.gz`

# Filters

Site filter:

```{bash, eval=FALSE}
QD < 2.0 || FS > 200.0 || ReadPosRankSum < -20.0 || SOR > 10.0 || QUAL < 30.0
```

Genotype filter:

```{bash, eval=FALSE}
DP < 3
```

# Script

- `scripts/10_filter_indels/filter_indels.sbatch`

# Run

```{bash, eval=FALSE}
cd /work/jyanglab/subhash/6.genomicsdb_5mb
sbatch genotype_vcfs/final_vcf/scripts/filter_indels.sbatch
```
